channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Experts say regular morning erections can indicate good heart and blood circulation health
item.description: According to health experts for Tanzania, waking up with a morning erection is normal and shows say a man's blood circulation and nervous system dey work fine. But if a man dey wake up without one man...

item.title: U.S. Pressures Iran to Reopen the Strait of Hormuz Amid Growing Regional Tensions
item.description: Former U.S. President Donald Trump has issued a Tuesday deadline for Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, escalating tensions between Washington and Tehran over control of one of the world’s most impo...

item.title: Burro: Grace Dent reviews a new Italian restaurant in Covent Garden
item.description: Grace Dent's review of Burro, a new Italian restaurant in Covent Garden, London, highlights the establishment’s charm and connection to chef Conor Gadd’s highly-regarded Islington restaurant, Trullo. ...

item.title: British comedy industry urges government to recognise and support comedy as an art form
item.description: Leading figures from Britain's comedy sector have called on the government to provide greater financial support and official recognition for comedy as an art form. Despite its popularity and cultural ...

item.title: Trump Issues Threats Over Strait of Hormuz Amid US Airman Rescue from Iran
item.description: Tensions between the United States and Iran escalated sharply after images emerged of a massive banner in Tehran proclaiming that the Strait of Hormuz will remain closed, declaring the Persian Gulf as...

item.title: Sindh government announces transport fare freeze with subsidies to ease fuel cost burden
item.description: On Sunday, Sindh Chief Minister Murad Ali Shah declared that the provincial government has successfully secured a freeze on public transport fares after negotiations with transporters facing soaring f...

item.title: Grandson of Nandalal Bose Reports Exclusion from West Bengal Voter List
item.description: Suprabuddha Sen, grandson of the eminent artist Nandalal Bose who illustrated the Indian Constitution, has reported that his and his wife Deepa Sen’s names were not included in the voter list of West ...

item.title: ODM MP Lilian Gogo Criticises Edwin Sifuna Over Disrespect Towards Leaders and Urges Further Education
item.description: Rangwe MP Lilian Gogo has openly criticised Nairobi Senator Edwin Sifuna, claiming that he is being misled by Babu Owino. Speaking after a church service in Muhoroni, Gogo questioned Sifuna's academic...

item.title: Yukon resident successfully grows a home pineapple after nine years
item.description: Alex Oberg of Whitehorse, Yukon, has successfully grown a pineapple at home after a remarkable nine-year effort. The journey began when Oberg acquired a pineapple crown from friends, which they had ro...

item.title: Beşiktaş Coach Sergen Yalçın Highlights Importance of Individual Performances Ahead of Derby
item.description: Beşiktaş head coach Sergen Yalçın spoke ahead of the upcoming derby against Fenerbahçe, emphasizing the importance of individual player skills in influencing match outcomes. He noted that the recent i...

item.title: Man Hospitalised After Alleged Assault Outside Charnwood Red Rooster
item.description: A man was taken to hospital after being allegedly assaulted outside the Red Rooster in Charnwood on the afternoon of Friday, March 6. ACT Policing reported that the incident occurred around 5:40 pm ne...

item.title: Tensions Rise in Nova Scotia After First Nations Protest Leads to Highway Blockades
item.description: Nova Scotia Premier Tim Houston has described the highway blockades staged by First Nations protesters as unacceptable, stressing that roads are vital for critical travel such as medical appointments....

item.title: Deputy President Mashatile Joins Faith Leaders to Promote Family Unity at Good Friday Service
item.description: Deputy President Paul Mashatile attended the Amandla Ngawethu Good Friday service at Ellis Park Stadium in Tshwane, marking his first official appearance at the Universal Church of the Kingdom of God’...

item.title: Trump warns Iran amid escalating tensions; Andhra Police uncover ISIS-linked network
item.description: The Times of India's evening news wrap for 5 April 2026 highlighted several major developments both in India and abroad. Former US President Donald Trump issued a furious online threat to Iran, hintin...

item.title: Tanzanian and Chinese teams remember sacrifices behind the Tazara Railway project
item.description: CRJE (East Africa) Ltd, together with Chinese and Tanzanian partners, held a solemn Qingming memorial in Dar es Salaam to honour Chinese experts who contributed to constructing the Tanzania–Zambia Rai...

item.title: Omoku People’s Forum To Establish ICT Centre In Rivers State For Youth Empowerment
item.description: An Information and Communication Technology (ICT) Centre is set to be established in Omoku, within the Ogba/Egbema/Ndoni Local Government Area of Rivers State. This important project is being driven b...

item.title: Over 2,500 Motorists Cited or Arrested During Easter Road Safety Operations in KZN
item.description: During the Easter weekend in KwaZulu-Natal, more than 2,500 motorists faced charges for various traffic offences, according to the KZN Transport MEC, Siboniso Duma. Between Thursday, 2 April, and Satu...

item.title: Supreme Court to review Zahir Jaffer's death sentence in Noor Mukadam case
item.description: The Supreme Court of Pakistan is set to hear, next week, the review appeal submitted by Zahir Jaffer — the man convicted of brutally murdering and beheading 27-year-old Noor Mukadam in July 2021. The ...

item.title: Archbishop of Canterbury calls for peace and justice in the Middle East during first Easter sermon
item.description: Dame Sarah Mullally, the first female Archbishop of Canterbury, has used her inaugural Easter sermon to call for peace amid the ongoing conflict in the Middle East. Addressing worshippers at Canterbur...

item.title: US Special Forces rescue downed airman in Iran following two-day operation
item.description: US Special Operations forces successfully rescued a downed US Air Force weapons systems officer from deep inside Iran after a high-risk operation over two days. The airman ejected from an F-15E Strike...
